entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `url` TEXT, `local_uri` TEXT, `thumbnail_uri` TEXT, `content_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `source_app` TEXT NOT NULL, `category_id` TEXT, `notes` TEXT, `ocr_text` TEXT, `metadata_json` TEXT, `is_favorite` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_pinned` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_archived` INTEGER NOT NULL, `is_pending_delete` INTEGER NOT NULL, `remind_at` INTEGER, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `opened_at` INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(`category_id`) REFERENCES `categories`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE SET NULL )

contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_save_items_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `save_items` BEGIN DELETE FROM `save_items_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_save_items_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `save_items` BEGIN DELETE FROM `save_items_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_save_items_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `save_items` BEGIN INSERT INTO `save_items_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `url`, `notes`, `ocr_text`, `source_app`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`url`, NEW.`notes`, NEW.`ocr_text`, NEW.`source_app`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_save_items_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `save_items` BEGIN INSERT INTO `save_items_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `url`, `notes`, `ocr_text`, `source_app`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`url`, NEW.`notes`, NEW.`ocr_text`, NEW.`source_app`); END
entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT NOT NULL, `url` TEXT, `notes` TEXT, `ocr_text` TEXT, `source_app` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`save_items`)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `emoji` TEXT NOT NULL, `color_hex` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sort_order` INTEGER NOT NULL, `parent_id` TEXT, `user_created` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`parent_id`) REFERENCES `categories`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE SET NULL )

indices.name: index_categories_sort_order
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_categories_sort_order` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`sort_order`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `item_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `uri` TEXT NOT NULL, `kind` TEXT NOT NULL, `ocr_text` TEXT, `sort_order` INTEGER NOT NULL, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`item_id`) REFERENCES `save_items`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`item_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `tag_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`item_id`, `tag_id`), FOREIGN KEY(`item_id`) REFERENCES `save_items`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`tag_id`) REFERENCES `tags`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )
